settings.headline:
Not a supplement.
A system.
settings.intro: Built from soil upward. Designed for lifespan, not trends. Request access — we only write when it matters.
settings.release_scope_line: First release: United Kingdom and Germany
settings.waitlist_success_message: You are on the list. Founding access is limited — we will be in touch.
settings.waitlist_subtext: We never sell the list. Unsubscribe in one click.
settings.footnote: Signups create tagged customers in Shopify Admin (intent-* tags when goal is selected). Connect Klaviyo for the email ladder.

settings.title: Founding access
settings.text: First to know at launch — allocation, pricing, and the science programme.

settings.title: Soil-first system
settings.text: Structured nutrition with published standards — not a noisy supplement aisle.

settings.text: Compliance and manufacturing aligned with where we ship first.
